info.name: TAFE Student Management API v1
info.description:
Complete API collection for testing the TAFE Student Management System v1.

This collection demonstrates:
- HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
- Request headers and body
- Response status codes
- Nested JSON responses
- Query parameters
- Path parameters
- API versioning (v1)

request.description:
Check if the API is running and healthy.

**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK
- Response contains: status, timestamp, service name

Retrieve a list of all available programs with enrollment counts.

**HTTP Method:** GET
**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK
- Content-Type: application/json
- Body: Array of program objects with enrolled_students count

Get details of a specific program by its ID.

**HTTP Method:** GET
**Path Parameter:** program_id
**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK (if found)
- Status Code: 404 Not Found (if program doesn't exist)
- Body: Program object with details

Retrieve a paginated list of students.

**HTTP Method:** GET
**Query Parameters:**
- page: Page number (optional)
- per_page: Items per page (optional)
- program_id: Filter by program (optional)

**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK
- Body: Array of student summaries with pagination metadata

Get students enrolled in a specific program.

**Query Parameter:** program_id
**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK
- Body: Filtered list of students

Get detailed information about a student including their program as nested JSON.

**HTTP Method:** GET
**Path Parameter:** student_id
**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 200 OK (if found)
- Status Code: 404 Not Found (if student doesn't exist)
- Body: Student object with nested program object

**Data Transformation Example:**
This endpoint demonstrates how flat database data is transformed into nested JSON:
- Database: student.program_id → program table lookup
- API Response: student object with embedded program object

Create a new student record.

**HTTP Method:** POST
**Headers:**
- Content-Type: application/json
- Accept: application/json

**Request Body (JSON):**
- first_name: Required
- last_name: Required
- email: Required (must be unique)
- program_id: Required (must exist)
- enrollment_date: Optional (defaults to today)

**Expected Responses:**
- Status Code: 201 Created (success)
- Status Code: 400 Bad Request (validation error)
- Status Code: 404 Not Found (program doesn't exist)
- Status Code: 409 Conflict (email already exists)

Update an existing student's information.

**HTTP Method:** PUT
**Path Parameter:** student_id
**Headers:**
- Content-Type: application/json

**Request Body:** All fields are optional, only provided fields will be updated

**Expected Responses:**
- Status Code: 200 OK (success)
- Status Code: 404 Not Found (student or program doesn't exist)
- Status Code: 409 Conflict (email already exists)

Delete a student from the system.

**HTTP Method:** DELETE
**Path Parameter:** student_id

**Expected Responses:**
- Status Code: 200 OK (success)
- Status Code: 404 Not Found (student doesn't exist)

Example of a 404 Not Found error when requesting a non-existent student.

**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 404 Not Found
- Body: Error message

Example of a 400 Bad Request error due to missing required fields.

**Expected Response:**
- Status Code: 400 Bad Request
- Body: Validation error details
